name: Abhijit Pramanik
tagline: I Build Proof — proof-backed SEO, content, video & websites
summary: Abhijit Pramanik is a freelance digital marketing and content specialist from India, working hands-on since 2019 across SEO, content writing, social media, video editing and websites for 36+ companies in India, Dubai and the USA.

this_website.built_by: Abhijit Pramanik built this entire portfolio himself, end to end — design, code and the AI assistant you're talking to now.
this_website.approach: Hand-coded with semantic HTML, a custom CSS design system (design tokens, fluid clamp-based spacing) and vanilla JavaScript — no page-builder, no bloated framework, so it loads fast and scores near-perfect on Google's performance, accessibility and SEO checks.
this_website.ai_assistant: This chat assistant is powered by a Cloudflare Worker that Abhijit set up, connected to a large language model with a private knowledge base of his real experience — showing he can ship modern AI features, not just talk about them.
this_website.why_it_matters: It's living proof: the site a client or employer is looking at was designed, engineered and AI-enabled by the same person they'd be hiring.
